ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trade_data" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade record */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Year of the trade record */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the trade record */,
  "country_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin for the product */,
  "tariff_code" TEXT /* Tariff code for the product */,
  "total_cif_value" REAL /* Total cost, insurance, and freight value of the item in USD */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of goods traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (import or export) */,
  "destination_country" TEXT /* Destination country for the trade */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code used in the trade */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the quantity */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status of the trade record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_tariff_code FOREIGN KEY ("tariff_code") REFERENCES tariffs ("tariff_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_period FOREIGN KEY ("period") REFERENCES trade_periods ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_country_origin FOREIGN KEY ("country_origin") REFERENCES countries ("country_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_destination_country FOREIGN KEY ("destination_country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Official name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tariffs" (
  "tariff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tariff */,
  "tariff_code" TEXT /* Code associated with the tariff */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tariff */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate of the tariff as a percentage */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the tariff became effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the tariff will expire */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional information or exceptions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tariff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year associated with the trade period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trade period (e.g., Q1, Q2) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trade period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trade period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_analysis_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user accessed the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, download report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser and device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistic record */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade period */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total trade value for the period */,
  "total_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity of goods traded for the period */,
  "average_value_per_unit" REAL /* Average value per unit of trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_statistics_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES trade_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_details" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the product record */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade record */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_details_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_details_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_conversion_rates" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the conversion rate record */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for conversion */,
  "rate" REAL /* Conversion rate to USD */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the conversion rate is applicable */,
  "source_currency_code" TEXT /* Source currency code for conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the compliance check record */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade record */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance check (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "checker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the compliance check */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional information or findings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trade_data ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_checks_checker_id FOREIGN KEY ("checker_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
